Hi  Pawan ,  
Thanks for showing interest in "The Startup Tales". 
We will get back to you as soon as possible. You can mail us at- thestartuptales@gmail.com
Thanks :)

Hello,

Your tale has been posted on the page.

The link is-https://www.facebook.com/thestartuptales/photos/a.1777083352616746.1073741827.1776826825975732/2000379266953819/?type=3&theater

Do tag yourselves and share it :)
I have replied to your mail :)

Hello,
We've received your email. We will respond to it shortly :)

Hey,
We would love to cover Kudsmart on our page.
Please email me at thestartuptales@gmail.com the profile and the work of Kydsmart. Post which, I'll take your interview and frame a tale in less than 250 words and post it.

Regards,
Ronak Banka

Hi  Pawan ,  
Thanks for showing interest in "The Startup Tales". 
We will get back to you as soon as possible. You can mail us at- thestartuptales@gmail.com
